title: DSDS Agent Context Collection
description: A standalone file containing agent context blocks for multiple entities in a design system. Each key in `sections` is a named scope (a component, a concern, a workflow phase) whose value is a full agents block. Use this when agent guidance spans many entities or cross-cutting concerns and embedding it inline on individual DSDS entities is impractical — for example, a system-wide pre-generation checklist, a migration guide, or a QA failure log.

version.description: The version of this collection file. Use for your own versioning — not tied to the DSDS spec version.

schema.description: URI of the schema this file conforms to. Tools can use this for auto-detection and validation.

name.description: Human-readable name for this collection (e.g., 'Sanity UI Pre-Generation Checklist', 'Material Design Migration Guide').

description.description: What this collection covers, who it's for, and how agents should use it.

updated.description: ISO date when this collection was last updated.

source.description: Where this collection was derived from — a test suite, an audit, a design system package, or a documentation site.

sections.description: Named agent context blocks. Each key is a scope identifier — a component name, a concern area, or a workflow phase. Each value is a full agents block validated against the agents schema. Keys should be lowercase kebab-case for consistency with DSDS entity naming.
